2025-2026 KHAS Theater Department Special Talent Exam

START DATE

END DATE

EXPLANATION

Tuesday, July 22, 2025 (10:00)

Friday, July 25, 2025 (23:59)

Registration period for the 2025 Special Talent Examination of the Department of Theater, Faculty of Art and Design

Saturday, July 26, 2025

Saturday, July 26, 2025

Announcement of the list of candidates who will participate in the 1st stage of the Special Talent Exam of the Department of Theatre, Faculty of Art and Design

Monday, July 28, 2025

Saturday, August 2, 2025 (If necessary)

Faculty of Art and Design, Department of Theatre, Special Talent Exam, Stage 1

Sunday, August 3, 2025

Sunday, August 3, 2025

Faculty of Art and Design, Department of Theatre, Special Talent Exam, Stage 2

11 Ağustos 2025 Pazartesi

Faculty of Art and Design, Department of Theatre, Special Talent Exam, Stage 3, 100% scholarship exam

Announcement of the candidates who passed the Special Talent Exam of the Faculty of Art and Design, Department of Theatre, as the main and reserve lists and notification of the results to the Student Affairs Directorate.

.

Important note: It is recommended to come in comfortable clothes and bring spare clothes. Due to hygiene rules, you will enter the workshop without shoes. It is recommended to come prepared as bare feet (without socks) will be used during the exam.

In the second stage, candidates prepare in advance,

with a drama (monologue)

They perform a comedy piece (monologue) on stage in front of the jury and

Önemli notlar:

No special voice work is required for the song. There is no accompaniment with recorded music or instruments. Candidates sing a favorite song in their mother tongue in any musical genre in any way they like. We recommend that you choose a favorite song rather than a singing or musical piece. For example, we would love to hear a song you like to sing in the shower.

Drama, comedy and song should not be longer than 3 minutes each.

The jury may conduct additional studies with the candidates during the exam.

Registration Dates

For the candidates who are successful in the Special Talent Examination, an announcement will be made on the website www.khas.edu.tr regarding the registration dates to the university.
